GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [qoh@4 ASC, i_product_name@0 ASC, i_brand@1 ASC, i_class@2 ASC, i_category@3 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[qoh@4 ASC, i_product_name@0 ASC, i_brand@1 ASC, i_class@2 ASC, i_category@3 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_product_name@0 as i_product_name, i_brand@1 as i_brand, i_class@2 as i_class, i_category@3 as i_category, avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@5 as qoh]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_product_name, i_brand, i_class, i_category, __grouping_id], aggr=[avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7615190
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_product_name@0, i_brand@1, i_class@2, i_category@3, __grouping_id@4], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuProjectExec: expr=[inv_quantity_on_hand@4 as inv_quantity_on_hand, i_brand@0 as i_brand, i_class@1 as i_class, i_category@2 as i_category, i_product_name@3 as i_product_name]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7615190
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, inv_item_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 6]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7615190
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=7615190
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7615190
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([inv_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7615190

                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7615190
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                  GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_month_seq@1 >= 1200 AND d_month_seq@1 <= 1211, projection=[0]

                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=7615190

--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=3872
